title: Data Engineer H-1B LCA All-Employer Market Data 2024 – h1bdata.info
note: 4,053 records, median $103,000. 42% below $100k (entry-level and staffing/consulting employers); 46% in the $100k–$150k band. Establishes the market floor and modal range for non-FAANG junior data engineers, including early-stage startup hires.
